summary: **Trucks beat target by 2.1%** — 643,033 BCM against 630,030 BCM target. The truck fleet delivered above plan.

followUps.title: **Survey missed target by 6.6%** — 588,626 BCM, 41,404 BCM short
followUps.body: A measurement artifact: loading outside the survey calculation area and North dump hauling outside the boundary from June 6 drove a persistent structural gap.
